title: chrysopogon hamiltonii
intro: Chrysopogon hamiltonii, also known as Vettiver or Khus-Khus, is a type of grass native to India and Southeast Asia, belonging to the Poaceae family. It has been traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Chrysopogon hamiltonii include reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and alleviating symptoms of menopause. Chrysopogon hamiltonii can be consumed in herbal preparations such as tea, essential oil, and powder, often used in aromatherapy and traditional medicine.
